value.stringValue: Internal Retrofit Capacity FTE,Internal Retrofit Capacity,Formal Training and Accreditation,Upskilling and Training,Summary

fields.name: FormalTrainingAndAccred_Text
fields.fieldText:
This section is about formalised training or accreditations received by you or your organisation’s staff in relation to Wave 3 retrofit delivery.

Please include:

• Training or accreditations completed during Wave 3, even if partly for other roles.

• Training completed in preparation for Wave 3 (before delivery began).

• Training funded or provided by another organisation for your staff.

Please do not include:

• Training or accreditations staff completed before joining your organisation.

• Training your organisation provided to staff from other organisations


If you are part of a Wave 3 delivery consortium, each partner organisation should complete their own response and send to the lead GR to submit in aggregate.

fields.name: Question9
fields.fieldText:
9. How many staff members received retrofit-relevant accreditations during Wave 3?


If you are the lead GR of a consortium please answer on behalf of your whole consortium


Enter the number of people receiving accreditations

fields.name: Training_Fitting_Air_Ground_HP
fields.fieldText: Fitting Air Source or Ground Source Heat Pumps

fields.name: Training_Fitting_Solar_PV_Thermal
fields.fieldText: Fitting Solar PV or Solar Thermal

fields.name: Training_Fitting_Other_Retrofit
fields.fieldText: Fitting Another Retrofit Product (e.g. double or triple glazing)

fields.name: Question10
fields.fieldText:
10. How many staff members attended retrofit-relevant training courses during Wave 3?


If you are the lead GR of a consortium please answer on behalf of your whole consortium


Enter the number of people attending training courses

fields.name: People_Trained_Fitting_Air_Ground_HP
fields.fieldText: Fitting Air Source or Ground Source Heat Pumps

fields.name: People_Trained_Fitting_Solar_PV_Therma
fields.fieldText: Fitting Solar PV or Solar Thermal

fields.name: People_Trained_Fitting_Other_Retrofit
fields.fieldText: Fitting Another Retrofit Product (e.g. double or triple glazing)

fields.name: Total_Number_of_Accreditations_People_Attending
fields.fieldText: Total Number of Training Courses Attended

value.stringValue: Internal Retrofit Capacity FTE,Internal Retrofit Capacity,Formal Training and Accreditation,Upskilling and Training,Summary

fields.name: FTERolesinRetrofit
fields.fieldText:
FTE Roles in Retrofit

The following questions ask about how many people, in terms of Full-Time Equivalent (FTE) posts, are currently involved in retrofit activities as part of their role within your organisation. This includes any involvement in retrofit, whether strategic, operational, or administrative, and not just those working on Wave 3.

• Please include all staff contributing to retrofit, even if retrofit is only part of their role.

• Do not include people who are only discussing retrofit in meetings but are not actively contributing to delivery or planning.


What does FTE mean?

FTE stands for Full-Time Equivalent, a standardised way to measure staffing levels based on hours worked. For example:

• 1.0 FTE = one person working full-time (based on a 37-hour week in the UK)

• 0.5 FTE = one person working half-time (based on a 18.5-hour week in the UK)

• Two part-time staff working 18.5 hours each = 1.0 FTE combined Please include all contract types (e.g. permanent, temporary, part-time, seconded staff).


If you are part of a Wave 3 delivery consortium, each partner organisation should complete their own response and send to the lead GR to submit in aggregate.

Example:

If your organisation has 100 FTEs working on retrofit in any capacity:

• 20 are senior officials

• 40 are public service professionals

• 10 are associate professionals

• 20 are skilled tradespeople 

• 10 are unknown

fields.name: Question1
fields.fieldText: 1. Within your organisation or consortium, how many FTE posts work in retrofit-related roles?

fields.name: FTE_Post_No_Mgrs_Dirs_Sr_Officials
fields.fieldText: Of these FTE posts, how many are managers, directors or senior officials?
fields.helpText:
For example:

chief executives, production managers and directors (SOC Code 11). In the retrofit context, these may be site managers, retrofit project managers, contracts managers.

fields.name: FTE_Post_No_Bus_Pub_Eng_Tech_Prof
fields.fieldText: Of these FTE posts, how many are business, public service, engineering and technology professionals?
fields.helpText: For example: R&D, IT, legal, finance, project management or chartered professionals (SOC Codes 21-24). In the retrofit context, these may be retrofit surveyors, retrofit assessors, architects, retrofit designers.

fields.name: FTE_Post_Bus_Pub_Eng_Tech_Prof
fields.fieldText: Of these FTE posts, how many are business, public service, engineering and technology associate professionals?
fields.helpText: For example: data analysts, sales and marketing executives, project support officers, account managers (SOC Codes 31-35). In the retrofit context, these may be retrofit coordinators, procurement roles.

fields.name: FTE_Post_No_Admin_Sales_Cust_Serv_Ops
fields.fieldText: Of these FTE posts, how many are in administrative, sales and customer service, or process, plant and machine operatives?
fields.helpText: For example: office managers, secretaries, machine drivers (SOC Codes 4, 71, 8). In the retrofit context, these may be resident liaison, retrofit advisors, administrators.

fields.name: FTE_Post_No_Skilled_Trades_Occs
fields.fieldText: Of these FTE posts, how many are from skilled trades occupations?
fields.helpText: For example: skilled construction and building trades, finishing trades, electricians (SOC Code 5). In the retrofit context, these may be construction roles, installers.

fields.name: FTE_Post_No_Other_Role_Categories
fields.fieldText: Of these FTE posts, how many don't fit into the categories shown?

fields.name: FTE_Post_No_Role_Unknown
fields.fieldText: Of these FTE posts, for how many is their role not known?

fields.name: wave3projectsofar
fields.fieldText:
2. For each occupation, please estimate what percentage have been directly involved in delivering your Wave 3 project so far.


Please consider individuals who spend time on practical or project management tasks related to Wave 3, which go beyond discussions in meetings.

fields.name: FTE_Post_Mgrs_Dirs_Sr_Officials
fields.fieldText: Estimated percentage of managers, directors or senior officials (%)
fields.helpText:
For example: chief executives, production managers and directors

(SOC Code 11). In the retrofit context, these may be site managers, retrofit project managers, contracts managers.

fields.name: FTE_Post_No_Assoc_Prof_Bus_Eng_Etc
fields.fieldText: Estimated percentage of business, public service, engineering and technology professionals (%)
fields.helpText: For example: R&D, IT, legal, finance, project management or chartered professionals (SOC Codes 21-24). In the retrofit context, these may be retrofit surveyors, retrofit assessors, architects, retrofit designers.

fields.name: FTE_Post_Assoc_Prof_Bus_Eng_etc
fields.fieldText: Estimated percentage of business, public service, engineering and technology associate professionals (%)
fields.helpText: For example: data analysts, sales and marketing executives, project support officers, account managers (SOC Codes 31-35). In the retrofit context, these may be retrofit coordinators, procurement roles.

fields.name: FTE_Post_Admin_Sales_Cust_Serv_Ops2
fields.fieldText: Estimated percentage of administrative, sales and customer service, or process, plant and machine operatives (%)
fields.helpText: For example: office managers, secretaries, machine drivers (SOC Codes 4, 71, 8). In the retrofit context, these may be resident liaison, retrofit advisors, administrators.

fields.name: FTE_Post_Skilled_Trades_Occs
fields.fieldText: Estimated percentage of skilled trades occupations (%)
fields.helpText: For example: skilled construction and building trades, finishing trades, electricians (SOC Code 5). In the retrofit context, these may be construction roles, installers.

fields.name: FTE_Post_Other_Role_Categories
fields.fieldText: Estimated percentage of those who don't fit into the categories shown (%)

fields.name: FTE_Post_Role_Unknown
fields.fieldText: Estimated percentage of those where their role not known (%)

fields.name: question3_displaytext
fields.fieldText:
3. Of the retrofit-related FTE posts, how many have newly joined the organisation or consortium, or moved internally from a role unrelated to retrofit during the Wave 3 project?


For the purpose of this question, "newly joined" refers to moving into a role on or after March 2025.

fields.name: question4_displaytext
fields.fieldText: 4. What are the nature of Newly Recruited Roles, if any?

value.stringValue: Internal Retrofit Capacity FTE,Internal Retrofit Capacity,Formal Training and Accreditation,Upskilling and Training,Summary

fields.name: Internal_Retrofit_start
fields.fieldText:
5. For each of the following retrofit-related roles in your Wave 3 project, please select your organisation’s main delivery model from the drop-down list.


If you are the lead GR of a consortium please answer on behalf of your own organisation only.


By main delivery model, we mean the one used for the majority of your delivery of Wave 3.

fields.name: question6_displaytext
fields.fieldText: 6. If you answered 'Other' to any of the above, please provide details.

fields.name: Apprentices_question7
fields.fieldText:
7. How many apprentices have you employed within your own organisation or consortium as part of Wave 3 so far?


Please include the total number of people employed as apprentices on the Wave 3 project since its start, even those who have since left, or who were studying for a qualification not specific to retrofit.


Please do not include any apprentices within your retrofit supply chain, and do not include qualifications which are not apprenticeships.


Please use the 'Don't know' field where you do not know the type of apprenticeship.

fields.name: question8_displaytext
fields.fieldText: 8. Please provide any further detail or context you wish to support information provided in question 7 above

fields.name: FurtherInfoLabel
fields.fieldText: ﻿This form has been reviewed and further information or a revision has been requested. Please see details below.

fields.name: Start_Screen_Display
fields.fieldText:
{!var_Entry_Type}


Social Housing Landlord Capacity and Capability: A1 form 

The first wave of data collection for the Social Housing Landlord Capacity and Capability form (A1) is now open. Please ensure data has been returned into the GMS by 12th December 2025. 


Before completing the data return, please ensure that you have reviewed the A1 form guidance that has been issued by IFF Research.

If you have any concerns or require support, please reach out to your IFF Research self-conducted evaluation Liaison Officer or contact SHFW3_EvaluationSupport@iffresearch.com.  


If your organisation is participating in Wave 3 as part of a consortium, please ensure that your consortium members have collected and shared data with you in the Excel template that has been provided by IFF Research. You are responsible for reviewing and checking all consortium data before aggregating returns to submit a single consortium response to the GMS. Please refer to the IFF Research issued guidance for step-by-step instructions on this process.

value.stringValue: Internal Retrofit Capacity FTE,Internal Retrofit Capacity,Formal Training and Accreditation,Upskilling and Training,Summary

fields.name: Info_bar
fields.fieldText: To edit sections please use a progress bar above

fields.name: retrofit_related_roles1
fields.fieldText: 1. Within your organisation or consortium, how many FTE posts work in retrofit-related roles?

fields.name: IRC2
fields.fieldText: Of these FTE posts, how many are managers, directors or senior officials?

fields.name: IRC4
fields.fieldText: Of these FTE posts, how many are business, public service, engineering and technology professionals?

fields.name: IRC6
fields.fieldText: Of these FTE posts, how many are business, public service, engineering and technology associate professionals?

fields.name: IRC8
fields.fieldText: Of these FTE posts, how many are in administrative, sales and customer service, or process, plant and machine operatives?

fields.name: IRC10
fields.fieldText: Of these FTE posts, how many are from skilled trades occupations?

fields.name: IRC12
fields.fieldText: Of these FTE posts, how many don't fit into the categories shown?

fields.name: IRC14
fields.fieldText: Of these FTE posts, how many is their role not known?

fields.name: Question2
fields.fieldText: 2. For each occupation, please estimate what percentage have been directly involved in delivering your Wave 3 project so far.

fields.name: IRC3
fields.fieldText: Of these FTE posts, how many are managers, directors or senior officials?

fields.name: IRC5
fields.fieldText: Of these FTE posts, how many are business, public service, engineering and technology professionals?

fields.name: IRC7
fields.fieldText: Of these FTE posts, how many are business, public service, engineering and technology associate professionals?

fields.name: IRC9
fields.fieldText: Of these FTE posts, how many are administrative, sales and customer service, or process, plant and machine operatives?

fields.name: IRC11
fields.fieldText: Of these FTE posts how many are from skilled trades occupations?

fields.name: IRC13
fields.fieldText: Of these FTE posts, how many don't fit into the categories shown?

fields.name: IRC15
fields.fieldText: Of these FTE posts, how many of their role is not known?

fields.name: Question3
fields.fieldText: 3. Of the retrofit-related FTE posts, how many have newly joined the organisation or consortium, or moved internally from a role unrelated to retrofit during the Wave 3 project?

fields.name: IRC17
fields.fieldText: 4. Nature of Newly Recruited Roles, if any?

fields.name: Question5
fields.fieldText:
5. For each of the following retrofit-related roles in your Wave 3 project, please select your organisation’s main delivery model from the drop-down list.


If you are the lead GR of a consortium please answer on behalf of your own organisation only.



CONSTRUCTION

fields.name: DS12
fields.fieldText: 6. If you answered 'Other' to any of the above, please provide details

fields.name: Question7
fields.fieldText: 7. How many apprentices have you employed within your own organisation or consortium as part of Wave 3 so far?

fields.name: A7
fields.fieldText: 8. Please provide any further detail or context you wish to support this information

fields.name: Question8
fields.fieldText:
9. How many staff members received retrofit-relevant accreditations during Wave 3?


If you are the lead GR of a consortium please answer on behalf of your whole consortium?


Enter the number of people receiving accreditations

fields.name: UT8
fields.fieldText: Fitting Air Source or Ground Source Heat Pumps

fields.name: UT10
fields.fieldText: Fitting Solar PV or Solar Thermal

fields.name: UT14
fields.fieldText: Fitting another retrofit product (e.g. double or triple glazing)

fields.name: Question10_Summary
fields.fieldText:
10. How many staff members attended retrofit-relevant training courses during Wave 3?


If you are the lead GR of a consortium please answer on behalf of your whole consortium ?


Enter the number of people attending training courses

fields.name: TC8
fields.fieldText: Fitting Air Source or Ground Source Heat Pumps

fields.name: TC10
fields.fieldText: Fitting Solar PV or Solar Thermal

fields.name: TC14
fields.fieldText: Fitting another retrofit product (e.g. double or triple glazing)

fields.name: Question11_summary
fields.fieldText:
11. Have you shared any resources or products with less experienced social housing providers, to support them to develop their retrofit

capabilities during Wave 3?

fields.name: q11_summary_part2
fields.fieldText: If you are the lead GR of a consortium please answer on behalf of your own organisation only.

fields.name: Question12_summary
fields.fieldText:
12. How many (if any) organisations have you supported to receive relevant retrofit accreditations during Wave 3?


If you are the lead GR of a consortium please answer on behalf of your your own organisation only.

fields.name: I_am_now_ready_to_submit_this_Self_Evaluation_Form
fields.fieldText: I am now ready to submit this Self-Evaluation Form

value.stringValue: Internal Retrofit Capacity FTE,Internal Retrofit Capacity,Formal Training and Accreditation,Upskilling and Training,Summary

fields.name: Upskilling_Training_Text
fields.fieldText:
The following questions are about how your organisation has helped build skills and capacity in the wider retrofit sector during Wave 3.

For example, this may include:

• Less experienced social housing providers

• Supply chain organisations

Please include any other details that you feel are relevant


If your answer to any the below questions is 'none', please list 0.


If you are the lead GR of a consortium please answer on behalf of your own organisation only.

fields.name: Question11
fields.fieldText: 11. Have you shared any resources or products with less experienced social housing providers, to support them to develop their retrofit capabilities during Wave 3?

fields.name: q11_questiontext
fields.fieldText: If you are the lead GR of a consortium please answer on behalf of your own organisation only

fields.name: If_you_are_the_lead_GR_of_a_consort
fields.helpText: If yes, please provide details of the resources shared, and the number of organisations shared with. This could include consortium members.

fields.name: Question12
fields.fieldText:
12. How many (if any) organisations have you supported to receive relevant retrofit accreditations during Wave 3?


This could include contractors or other social housing providers, in or outside of a consortium. Please provide any further relevant details


If you are the lead GR of a consortium please answer on behalf of your own organisation only

subflows.name: GMS_Set_Funding_Award_Participant_PSO_as_Owner
subflows.label: GMS - Set Funding Award Participant PSO as Owner
